menu.name: Cutting Chai
menu.description: Traditional sweet local ginger cardamom infused spiced tea, served piping hot.

menu.name: Paneer Tikka Burger
menu.description: Juicy tandoori marinated cottage cheese slab grilled to perfection, topped with mint chutney, sliced onions, and crispy lettuce.

menu.name: Veg Cheese Club Sandwich
menu.description: Buttered slices of bread filled with spicy potato mash, bell peppers, cucumbers, and loaded with melted Amul cheese.

menu.name: Tandoori Paneer Pizza
menu.description: Hand-stretched thin crust loaded with tandoori paneer cubes, capsicum, red onions, mozzarella, and spicy makhani sauce.

menu.name: Sizzling Chocolate Brownie
menu.description: Rich eggless dark chocolate brownie served on a hot iron skillet with a scoop of vanilla ice cream and hot chocolate fudge drizzle.

menu.name: Butter Chicken Burger
menu.description: Charcoal-grilled succulent chicken breast steak steeped in creamy buttery makhani sauce, topped with onions and crisp greens.

menu.name: Spicy Chicken Seekh Roll
menu.description: Tender chicken seekh kebab wrapped in a soft Indian flatbread with sliced raw cabbage, onions, and spicy green cilantro sauce.

menu.name: Chicken Tikka Pizza
menu.description: Crispy thick crust pizza topped with smoked chicken tikka chunks, jalapeños, red onions, mozzarella, and drizzle of tandoori mayo.

menu.name: Egg-Mayonnaise Club Sandwich
menu.description: Dual layer toasted bread filled with creamy egg salad mixed with ground pepper, mustard, and green lettuce.
